## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and removed unused code.
- [ ] I ran `cargo fmt --check`.
- [ ] I ran Clippy with warnings denied.
- [ ] I ran `cargo test --all-targets`.
- [ ] I documented known limitations or deferred work.
- [ ] I preserved upstream attribution.
